description:
# Calendar UI

Monthly calendar view in the Automaker UI using react-day-picker. Shows features as color-coded dots, milestones as distinct markers, and custom events with badges.

## Phases
1. Calendar view component with react-day-picker
2. Calendar route and sidebar navigation
3. Custom event creation and management UI
title: [Epic] Calendar UI
